04424 
04429   class EMREXTTEXTOUTA : public METARECORD, ::EMREXTTEXTOUTA {
04430     PSTR string_a;
04431     int string_size;
04432 
04433     INT* dx_i;
04434   public:
04444     EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( const RECTL* bounds, DWORD graphicsMode, FLOAT xScale,
04445                      FLOAT yScale, const PEMRTEXT text, LPCSTR string,
04446                      const INT* dx )
04447     {
04448       emr.iType = EMR_EXTTEXTOUTA;
04449       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMREXTTEXTOUTA );
04450 
04451       rclBounds = *bounds;
04452 
04453       iGraphicsMode = graphicsMode;
04454       exScale = xScale;
04455       eyScale = yScale;
04456 
04457       emrtext = *text;
04458 
04459       string_size = ROUND_TO_LONG( emrtext.nChars );
04460 
04461       string_a = new CHAR[ string_size ];
04462 
04463       memset( string_a, 0, sizeof(CHAR) * string_size );
04464 
04465       for ( unsigned int i=0; i<emrtext.nChars; i++ )
04466         string_a[i] = *string++;
04467 
04468       emrtext.offString = emr.nSize;
04469       emr.nSize += string_size * sizeof(CHAR);
04470 #if 0
04471 /* 
04472 Test only - Problem: Windows requires this dx to be set - at least from 2K on
04473 but to calculate real dx values is hard 
04474 For pstoedit - this is "fixed" now by estimating dx in pstoedit
04475 */
04476       if ( !dx ) {
04477         int * dxn = new  int [string_size];
04478         for (unsigned int i=0; i < string_size; i++) dxn[i] = 10;
04479         dx = dxn;
04480       }
04481 #endif
04482 
04483       if ( dx ) {
04484 
04485         dx_i = new INT[ emrtext.nChars ];
04486 
04487         for ( unsigned int i=0; i<emrtext.nChars; i++ )
04488           dx_i[i] = *dx++;
04489 
04490         emrtext.offDx = emr.nSize;
04491         emr.nSize += emrtext.nChars * sizeof(INT);
04492       }
04493       else {
04494         emrtext.offDx = 0;
04495         dx_i = 0;
04496       }
04497     }
04502     EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( DATASTREAM& ds )
04503     {
04504       ds >> emr >> rclBounds >> iGraphicsMode >> exScale >> eyScale >> emrtext;
04505 
04506       if ( emrtext.offString != 0 ) {
04507         string_size = ROUND_TO_LONG( emrtext.nChars );
04508 
04509         string_a = new CHAR[ string_size ];
04510 
04511         memset( string_a, 0, sizeof(CHAR) * string_size );
04512 
04513         CHARSTR string( string_a, string_size );
04514 
04515         ds >> string;
04516       }
04517       else
04518         string_a = 0;
04519 
04520       if ( emrtext.offDx ) {
04521         dx_i = new INT[ emrtext.nChars ];
04522 
04523         INTARRAY dx_is( dx_i, emrtext.nChars );
04524 
04525         ds >> dx_is;
04526       }
04527       else
04528         dx_i = 0;
04529     }
04534     ~EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( )
04535     {
04536       if ( string_a ) delete[] string_a;
04537       if ( dx_i ) delete[] dx_i;
04538     }
04542     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04543     {
04544       ds << emr << rclBounds << iGraphicsMode << exScale << eyScale
04545          << emrtext << CHARSTR( string_a, string_size );
04546       if ( dx_i )
04547         ds << INTARRAY( dx_i, emrtext.nChars );
04548       return true;
04549     }
04553     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04559     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
04560     {
04561       RECT rect;
04562       rect.left = emrtext.rcl.left;
04563       rect.top = emrtext.rcl.top;
04564       rect.right = emrtext.rcl.right;
04565       rect.bottom = emrtext.rcl.bottom;
04566 
04567       ExtTextOutA( dc, emrtext.ptlReference.x, emrtext.ptlReference.y,
04568                    emrtext.fOptions, &rect, string_a, emrtext.nChars,
04569                    dx_i );
04570     }
04571 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04572 
04575     void edit ( void ) const
04576     {
04577 #if defined(__x86_64__)
04578     const char* FMT0 = "unknown(%d)\n";
04579     const char* FMT1 = "\tptlReference\t: (%d,%d)\n";
04580     const char* FMT2 = "\tnChars\t\t: %d\n";
04581     const char* FMT3 = "\toffString\t: %d\n";
04582     const char* FMT4 = "\toffDx\t\t: %d\n";
04583 #else
04584     const char* FMT0 = "unknown(%ld)\n";
04585     const char* FMT1 = "\tptlReference\t: (%ld,%ld)\n";
04586     const char* FMT2 = "\tnChars\t\t: %ld\n";
04587     const char* FMT3 = "\toffString\t: %ld\n";
04588     const char* FMT4 = "\toffDx\t\t: %ld\n";
04589 #endif /* __x86_64__ */
04590       printf( "*EXTTEXTOUTA*\n" );
04591       edit_rectl( "rclBounds", rclBounds );
04592       printf( "\tiGraphicsMode\t: " );
04593       switch ( iGraphicsMode ) {
04594       case GM_COMPATIBLE: printf( "GM_COMPATIBLE\n" ); break;
04595       case GM_ADVANCED: printf( "GM_ADVANCED\n" ); break;
04596       default: printf( FMT0, iGraphicsMode );
04597       }
04598       printf( "\texScale\t\t: %f\n", exScale );
04599       printf( "\teyScale\t\t: %f\n", eyScale );
04600       printf( FMT1, emrtext.ptlReference.x, emrtext.ptlReference.y );
04601       printf( FMT2, emrtext.nChars );
04602       printf( FMT3, emrtext.offString );
04603       printf( "\tfOptions\t: " );
04604       if ( emrtext.fOptions == 0 )
04605         printf( "None" );
04606       else {
04607         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_GRAYED ) {
04608           printf( "ETO_GRAYED" );
04609           if ( emrtext.fOptions & ~ETO_GRAYED )
04610             printf( " | " );
04611         }
04612         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_OPAQUE ) {
04613           printf( "ETO_OPAQUE" );
04614           if ( emrtext.fOptions & ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE) )
04615             printf( " | " );
04616         }
04617         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_CLIPPED ) {
04618           printf( "ETO_CLIPPED" );
04619           if ( emrtext.fOptions & ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE | ETO_CLIPPED ) )
04620             printf( " | " );
04621         }
04622         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_GLYPH_INDEX ) {
04623           printf( "ETO_GLYPH_INDEX" );
04624           if ( emrtext.fOptions &
04625                ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE | ETO_CLIPPED | ETO_GLYPH_INDEX) )
04626             printf( " | " );
04627         }
04628         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_RTLREADING ) {
04629           printf( "ETO_RTLREADING" );
04630           if ( emrtext.fOptions &
04631                ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE | ETO_CLIPPED | ETO_GLYPH_INDEX |
04632                  ETO_RTLREADING) )
04633             printf( " | " );
04634         }
04635         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_IGNORELANGUAGE )
04636           printf( "ETO_IGNORELANGUAGE" );
04637       }
04638       printf( "\n" );
04639       edit_rectl( "rcl\t", emrtext.rcl );
04640       printf( FMT4, emrtext.offDx );
04641       printf( "\tString:\n\t\t%s\n",  string_a );
04642 
04643       if ( emrtext.offDx != 0 ) {
04644         printf( "\tOffsets:\n\t\t" );
04645         for ( unsigned int i = 0; i < emrtext.nChars; i++ )
04646           printf( "%d ", dx_i[i] );
04647         printf( "\n" );
04648       }
04649     }
04650 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04651   };
04652 
04654 
04657   class EMRSETPIXELV : public METARECORD, ::EMRSETPIXELV {
04658   public:
04664     EMRSETPIXELV ( INT x, INT y, COLORREF color )
04665     {
04666       emr.iType = EMR_SETPIXELV;
04667       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRSETPIXELV );
04668       ptlPixel.x = x;
04669       ptlPixel.y = y;
04670       crColor = color;
04671     }
04676     EMRSETPIXELV ( DATASTREAM& ds )
04677     {
04678       ds >> emr >> ptlPixel >> crColor;
04679     }
04683     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04684     {
04685       ds << emr << ptlPixel << crColor;
04686       return true;
04687     }
04691     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04697     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
04698     {
04699       SetPixel( dc, ptlPixel.x, ptlPixel.y, crColor );
04700     }
04701 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04702 
04705     void edit ( void ) const
04706     {
04707       printf( "*SETPIXELV*\n" );
04708       edit_pointl( "ptlPixel", ptlPixel );
04709       edit_color( "crColor\t", crColor );
04710     }
04711 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04712   };
04713 
04714   class PEN;
04715   class EXTPEN;
04716   class BRUSH;
04717   class FONT;
04718   class PALETTE;
04719 
04721 
04724   class EMRCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPEN
04725   {
04726   public:
04731     EMRCREATEPEN ( PEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
04736     EMRCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04740     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04741     {
04742       ds << emr << ihPen << lopn;
04743       return true;
04744     }
04748     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04754     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04755 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04756 
04759     void edit ( void ) const
04760     {
04761 #if defined(__x86_64__)
04762       const char* FMT0 = "\tihPen\t\t: 0x%x\n";
04763       const char* FMT1 = "\tlopn.lopnWidth\t: %d, %d\n";
04764 #else
04765       const char* FMT0 = "\tihPen\t\t: 0x%lx\n";
04766       const char* FMT1 = "\tlopn.lopnWidth\t: %ld, %ld\n";
04767 #endif /* __x86_64__ */
04768       printf( "*CREATEPEN*\n" );
04769       printf( FMT0, ihPen );
04770       edit_pen_style( "lopn.lopnStyle", lopn.lopnStyle );
04771       printf( FMT1, lopn.lopnWidth.x, lopn.lopnWidth.y );
04772       edit_color( "lopn.lopnColor", lopn.lopnColor );
04773     }
04774 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04775   };
04776 
04778 
04782   class EMREXTCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEPEN
04783   {
04784   public:
04789     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( EXTPEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
04794     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04798     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04799     {
04800       ds << emr << ihPen << offBmi << cbBmi << offBits << cbBits << elp;
04801       return true;
04802     }
04806     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04812     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04813 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04814 
04817     void edit ( void ) const
04818     {
04819 #if defined(__x86_64__)
04820       const char* FMT0 = "\tihPen\t\t\t: 0x%x\n";
04821       const char* FMT1 = "\toffBmi\t\t\t: %d\n";
04822       const char* FMT2 = "\tcbBmi\t\t\t: %d\n";
04823       const char* FMT3 = "\toffBits\t\t\t: %d\n";
04824       const char* FMT4 = "\tcbBits\t\t\t: %d\n";
04825       const char* FMT5 = "\telp.elpWidth\t\t: %d\n";
04826       const char* FMT6 = "\telp.elpNumEntries\t: %d\n";
04827 #else
04828       const char* FMT0 = "\tihPen\t\t\t: 0x%lx\n";
04829       const char* FMT1 = "\toffBmi\t\t\t: %ld\n";
04830       const char* FMT2 = "\tcbBmi\t\t\t: %ld\n";
04831       const char* FMT3 = "\toffBits\t\t\t: %ld\n";
04832       const char* FMT4 = "\tcbBits\t\t\t: %ld\n";
04833       const char* FMT5 = "\telp.elpWidth\t\t: %ld\n";
04834       const char* FMT6 = "\telp.elpNumEntries\t: %ld\n";
04835 #endif /* __x86_64__ */
04836       printf( "*EXTCREATEPEN*\n" );
04837       printf( FMT0, ihPen );
04838       printf( FMT1,  offBmi );
04839       printf( FMT2, cbBmi );
04840       printf( FMT3, offBits );
04841       printf( FMT4, cbBits );
04842       edit_pen_style( "elp.elpPenStyle\t", elp.elpPenStyle );
04843       printf( FMT5, elp.elpWidth );
04844       edit_brush_style( "elp.elpBrushStyle", elp.elpBrushStyle );
04845       edit_color( "elp.elpColor\t", elp.elpColor );
04846       edit_brush_hatch( "elp.elpHatch\t", elp.elpHatch );
04847       printf( FMT6, elp.elpNumEntries );
04848     }
04849 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04850   };
04851 
04853 
04856   class EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT
04857   {
04858   public:
04863     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( BRUSH* brush, HGDIOBJ handle );
04868     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04872     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04873     {
04874       ds << emr << ihBrush << lb;
04875       return true;
04876     }
04880     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04886     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04887 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04888 
04891     void edit ( void ) const
04892     {
04893 #if defined(__x86_64__)
04894       const char* FMT = "\tihBrush\t\t: 0x%x\n";
04895 #else
04896       const char* FMT = "\tihBrush\t\t: 0x%lx\n";
04897 #endif /* __x86_64__ */
04898       printf( "*CREATEBRUSHINDIRECT*\n" );
04899       printf( FMT, ihBrush );
04900       edit_brush_style( "lb.lbStyle", lb.lbStyle );
04901       edit_color( "lb.lbColor", lb.lbColor );
04902       edit_brush_hatch( "lb.lbHatch", lb.lbHatch );
04903     }
04904 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04905   };

04908 
04911   class EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW
04912   {
04913   public:
04918     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( FONT* font, HGDIOBJ handle );
04923     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04927     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04928     {
04929       // Since EMF records have to be multiples of 4 bytes, this
04930       // should perhaps be a general thing, but we know it's currently
04931       // only a problem for this structure.
04932 
04933       ds << emr << ihFont << elfw << PADDING( 2 );
04934 
04935       return true;
04936     }
04940     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04946     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04947 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04948 
04951     void edit ( void ) const
04952     {
04953 #if defined(__x86_64__)
04954       const char* FMT0 = "\tihFont\t\t\t: %d\n";
04955       const char* FMT1 = "\tlfHeight\t\t: %d\n";
04956       const char* FMT2 = "\tlfWidth\t\t\t: %d\n";
04957       const char* FMT3 = "\tlfEscapement\t\t: %d\n";
04958       const char* FMT4 = "\tlfOrientation\t\t: %d\n";
04959       const char* FMT5 = "\telfVersion\t\t: %d\n";
04960       const char* FMT6 = "\telfStyleSize\t\t: %d\n";
04961       const char* FMT7 = "\telfMatch\t\t: %d\n";
04962       const char* FMT8 = "\telfCulture\t\t: %d\n";
04963 #else
04964       const char* FMT0 = "\tihFont\t\t\t: %ld\n";
04965       const char* FMT1 = "\tlfHeight\t\t: %ld\n";
04966       const char* FMT2 = "\tlfWidth\t\t\t: %ld\n";
04967       const char* FMT3 = "\tlfEscapement\t\t: %ld\n";
04968       const char* FMT4 = "\tlfOrientation\t\t: %ld\n";
04969       const char* FMT5 = "\telfVersion\t\t: %ld\n";
04970       const char* FMT6 = "\telfStyleSize\t\t: %ld\n";
04971       const char* FMT7 = "\telfMatch\t\t: %ld\n";
04972       const char* FMT8 = "\telfCulture\t\t: %ld\n";
04973 #endif /* __x86_64__ */
04974       printf( "*EXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW*\n" );
04975       printf( FMT0, ihFont );
04976       printf( FMT1, elfw.elfLogFont.lfHeight );
04977       printf( FMT2, elfw.elfLogFont.lfWidth );
04978       printf( FMT3, elfw.elfLogFont.lfEscapement );
04979       printf( FMT4, elfw.elfLogFont.lfOrientation );
04980       printf( "\tlfWeight\t\t: " );
04981       switch ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfWeight ) {
04982       case FW_DONTCARE: printf( "FW_DONTCARE\n" ); break;
04983       case FW_THIN: printf( "FW_THIN\n" ); break;
04984       case FW_EXTRALIGHT: printf( "FW_EXTRALIGHT\n" ); break;
04985       case FW_LIGHT: printf( "FW_LIGHT\n" ); break;
04986       case FW_NORMAL: printf( "FW_NORMAL\n" ); break;
04987       case FW_MEDIUM: printf( "FW_MEDIUM\n" ); break;
04988       case FW_SEMIBOLD: printf( "FW_SEMIBOLD\n" ); break;
04989       case FW_BOLD: printf( "FW_BOLD\n" ); break;
04990       case FW_EXTRABOLD: printf( "FW_EXTRABOLD\n" ); break;
04991       case FW_BLACK: printf( "FW_BLACK\n" ); break;
04992       }
04993       printf( "\tlfItalic\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfItalic );
04994       printf( "\tlfUnderline\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfUnderline );
04995       printf( "\tlfStrikeOut\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfStrikeOut );
04996       printf( "\tlfCharSet\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfCharSet );
04997       printf( "\tlfOutPrecision\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOutPrecision );
04998       printf( "\tlfClipPrecision\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfClipPrecision );
04999       printf( "\tlfQuality\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfQuality );
05000       printf( "\tlfPitchAndFamily\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfPitchAndFamily );
05001       int i = 0;
05002       printf( "\tlfFaceName\t\t: '" );
05003       while ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
05004         putchar( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] );
05005         i++;
05006       }
05007       puts( "'" );
05008 
05009       i = 0;
05010       printf( "\telfFullName\t\t: '" );
05011       while ( elfw.elfFullName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FULLFACESIZE ) {
05012         putchar( elfw.elfFullName[i] );
05013         i++;
05014       }
05015       puts( "'" );
05016 
05017       i = 0;
05018       printf( "\telfStyle\t\t: '" );
05019       while ( elfw.elfStyle[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
05020         putchar( elfw.elfStyle[i] );
05021         i++;
05022       }
05023       puts( "'" );
05024 
05025       printf( FMT5, elfw.elfVersion );
05026       printf( FMT6, elfw.elfStyleSize );
05027       printf( FMT7, elfw.elfMatch );
05028       printf( "\telfVendorId\t\t: '%s'\n", elfw.elfVendorId );
05029       printf( FMT8, elfw.elfCulture );
05030       printf( "\telfPanose\t\t:\n" );
05031       printf( "\t\tbFamilyType\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bFamilyType );
05032       printf( "\t\tbSerifStyle\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bSerifStyle );
05033       printf( "\t\tbWeight\t\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bWeight );
05034       printf( "\t\tbProportion\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bProportion );
05035       printf( "\t\tbContrast\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bContrast );
05036       printf( "\t\tbStrokeVariation\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bStrokeVariation );
05037       printf( "\t\tbArmStyle\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bArmStyle );
05038       printf( "\t\tbLetterform\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bLetterform );
05039       printf( "\t\tbMidline\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bMidline );
05040       printf( "\t\tbXHeight\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bXHeight );
05041     }
05042 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05043   };
05044 
05046 
05049   class EMRCREATEPALETTE : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPALETTE
05050   {
05051   public:
05056     EMRCREATEPALETTE ( PALETTE* palette, HGDIOBJ handle );
05061     EMRCREATEPALETTE ( DATASTREAM& ds );

05066     {
05067       ds << emr << ihPal << lgpl;
05068       return true;
05069     }

05084     void edit ( void ) const
05085     {
05086       printf( "*CREATEPALETTE* (not really handled by libEMF)\n" );
05087     }
05088 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05089   };

05092 
05095   class EMRFILLPATH : public METARECORD, ::EMRFILLPATH {
05096   public:
05101     EMRFILLPATH ( const RECTL* bounds )
05102     {
05103       emr.iType = EMR_FILLPATH;
05104       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRFILLPATH );
05105       rclBounds = *bounds;
05106     }
05111     EMRFILLPATH ( DATASTREAM& ds )
05112     {
05113       ds >> emr >> rclBounds;
05114     }
05118     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
05119     {
05120       ds << emr << rclBounds;
05121       return true;
05122     }
05126     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
05132     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
05133     {
05134       FillPath( dc );
05135     }
05136 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
05137 
05140     void edit ( void ) const
05141     {
05142       printf( "*FILLPATH*\n" );
05143       edit_rectl( "rclBounds", rclBounds );
05144     }
05145 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05146   };
05148 
05151   class EMRSTROKEPATH : public METARECORD, ::EMRSTROKEPATH {
05152   public:
05157     EMRSTROKEPATH ( const RECTL* bounds )
05158     {
05159       emr.iType = EMR_STROKEPATH;
05160       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRSTROKEPATH );
05161       rclBounds = *bounds;
05162     }
05167     EMRSTROKEPATH ( DATASTREAM& ds )
05168     {
05169       ds >> emr >> rclBounds;
05170     }
05174     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
05175     {
05176       ds << emr << rclBounds;
05177       return true;
05178     }
05182     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
05188     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
05189     {
05190       StrokePath( dc );
05191     }
05192 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
05193 
05196     void edit ( void ) const
05197     {
05198       printf( "*STROKEPATH*\n" );
05199       edit_rectl( "rclBounds", rclBounds );
05200     }
05201 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05202   };

05207   class EMRSTROKEANDFILLPATH : public METARECORD, ::EMRSTROKEANDFILLPATH {

05216       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRSTROKEANDFILLPATH );
05217       rclBounds = *bounds;
05218     }
05223     EMRSTROKEANDFILLPATH ( DATASTREAM& ds )
05224     {
05225       ds >> emr >> rclBounds;
05226     }

05231     {
05232       ds << emr << rclBounds;
05233       return true;
05234     }

05476   class EMRRESTOREDC : public METARECORD, ::EMRRESTOREDC {

05482     {
05483       emr.iType = EMR_RESTOREDC;
05484       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRRESTOREDC );
05485       iRelative = n;
05486     }
05491     EMRRESTOREDC ( DATASTREAM& ds )
05492     {
05493       ds >> emr >> iRelative;
05494     }
05498     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
05499     {
05500       ds << emr << iRelative;
05501       return true;
05502     }
05506     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
05512     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
05513     {
05514       RestoreDC( dc, iRelative );
05515     }
05516 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
05517 
05520     void edit ( void ) const
05521     {
05522 #if defined(__x86_64__)
05523       const char* FMT = "\tiRelative: %d\n";
05524 #else
05525       const char* FMT = "\tiRelative: %ld\n";
05526 #endif /* __x86_64__ */
05527       printf( "*RESTOREDC*\n" );
05528       printf( FMT, iRelative );
05529     }
05530 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05531   };

05598       lopnWidth = lpen->lopnWidth;

05600     }
05604     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PEN; }

05612     {
05613       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05614       return new EMRCREATEPEN( this, emf_handle );

05634       elpNumEntries = 0;
05635       elpStyleEntry[0] = 0;

05648     {

05690   class FONT : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public EXTLOGFONTW {
05691   public:
05695     FONT ( const LOGFONTW* lfont )
05696     {
05697       this->elfLogFont = *lfont;
05698       // There are a lot more entries in the EXTLOGFONTW structure than
05699       // the API has values for, so we invent them here
05700       memset( &elfFullName, 0, sizeof elfFullName );
05701       memset( &elfStyle, 0, sizeof elfStyle );
05702       elfVersion = ELF_VERSION;
05703       elfStyleSize = 0;
05704       elfMatch = 0;
05705       elfReserved = 0;
05706       memset( &elfVendorId, 0, sizeof elfVendorId );
05707       elfCulture = ELF_CULTURE_LATIN;
05708       memset( &elfPanose, 1, sizeof(PANOSE) );
05709     }
05713     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_FONT; }
05720     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05721     {
05722       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05723       return new EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW( this, emf_handle );
05724     }
05725   };
05726 
05728

05732   public:
05736     PALETTE ( const LOGPALETTE* lpalette )
05737     {
05738       (void)lpalette;
05739       palVersion = 0;
05740       palNumEntries = 0;
05741       PALETTEENTRY zero_entry = { 0, 0, 0, 0 };
05742       palPalEntry[0] = zero_entry;
05743     }
05747     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PALETTE; }
05754     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05755     {
05756       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05757       return new EMRCREATEPALETTE( this, emf_handle );
05758     }
05759   };
05760 
05762 
05768   class METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT : public OBJECT {
05776     void init ( const RECT* size, LPCWSTR description_w ) {
05777 
05778       // Evidently, metafile handles are numbered from 1, so don't
05779       // ever use 0.
05780 
05781       handles.push_back( true );
05782 
05783       // Keep some of our graphics state in a header record
05784 
05785       header = new ENHMETAHEADER ( description_w );
05786       records.push_back( header );
05787 
05788       // Compute the size and position of the metafile on the "page"
05789 
05790       if ( size ) {
05791         update_frame = false;
05792 
05793         header->rclFrame.left = size->left;
05794         header->rclFrame.top = size->top;
05795         header->rclFrame.right = size->right;
05796         header->rclFrame.bottom = size->bottom;
05797 
05798         header->rclBounds.left =
05799           size->left * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
05800         header->rclBounds.top =
05801           size->top * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
05802         header->rclBounds.right =
05803           size->right * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
05804         header->rclBounds.bottom =
05805           size->bottom * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
05806       }
05807       else {
05808         update_frame = true;
05809 
05810         header->rclBounds.left = -10;
05811         header->rclBounds.top = -10;
05812         header->rclBounds.right = 10;
05813         header->rclBounds.bottom = 10;
05814 
05815         header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
05816           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05817         header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
05818           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05819         header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
05820           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05821         header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
05822           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05823       }
05824 
05825       // Some default graphics state (are they really, though?)
05826 
05827       SIZEL default_resolution = { RESOLUTION, RESOLUTION };
05828       resolution = default_resolution;
05829       SIZEL default_viewport_ext = { 1, 1 };
05830       viewport_ext = default_viewport_ext;
05831       POINT default_viewport_org = { 0, 0 };
05832       viewport_org = default_viewport_org;
05833       SIZEL default_window_ext = { 1, 1 };
05834       window_ext = default_window_ext;
05835       POINT default_window_org = { 0, 0 };
05836       window_org = default_window_org;
05837 
05838       min_device_point = viewport_org;
05839       max_device_point = viewport_org;
05840 
05841       pen = (PEN*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_PEN | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
05842       brush = (BRUSH*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_BRUSH | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
05843       font = (FONT*)globalObjects.find( DEVICE_DEFAULT_FONT | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
05844       palette = (PALETTE*)globalObjects.find( DEFAULT_PALETTE|ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
05845 
05846       text_alignment = TA_BASELINE;
05847       text_color = RGB(0,0,0);
05848       bk_color = RGB(0xff,0xff,0xff);
05849       bk_mode = OPAQUE;
05850       polyfill_mode = ALTERNATE;
05851       map_mode = MM_TEXT;
05852 
05853       handle = globalObjects.add( this );
05854     }
05855 
05856   public:
05860     ::FILE* fp;
05865     DATASTREAM ds;
05869     ENHMETAHEADER* header;
05873     std::vector< EMF::METARECORD* > records;
05874 
05875     // Keep a small set of graphics state information
05876     SIZEL resolution;           
05877     SIZEL viewport_ext;         
05878     POINT viewport_org;         
05879     SIZEL window_ext;           
05880     POINT window_org;           
05881     bool update_frame;          
05882     POINT min_device_point;     
05883     POINT max_device_point;     
05884     POINT point;                
05885     PEN* pen;                   
05886     BRUSH* brush;               
05887     FONT* font;                 
05888     PALETTE* palette;           
05889     UINT text_alignment;        
05890     COLORREF text_color;        
05891     COLORREF bk_color;          
05892     INT bk_mode;                
05893     INT polyfill_mode;          
05894     INT map_mode;               
05895 
05901     std::vector< bool > handles;
05902 
05908     std::map< HGDIOBJ, HGDIOBJ > emf_handles;
05909 
05920       METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( FILE* fp_, const RECT* size,
05921                               LPCWSTR description_w )
05922         : fp(fp_), ds( fp_ )
05923     {
05924           init( size, description_w );
05925     }
05930     virtual ~METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( )
05931     {
05932       // Purge all the metarecords (if there are any) {this include the
05933       // header record, too}
05934       if ( records.size() > 0 )
05935         deleteMetafile();
05936     }
05940     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT; }
05945     DWORD nextHandle ( void )
05946     {
05947       for ( unsigned int i = 1; i < handles.size(); i++ ) {
05948         if ( !handles[i] ) {
05949           handles[i] = true;
05950           return i;
05951         }
05952       }
05953       handles.push_back( true );
05954       // Well, it appears that even StockObject handles count for something.
05955       // Not sure what the right value here is, then.
05956       header->nHandles = handles.size();
05957       return handles.size()-1;
05958     }
05962     void clearHandle ( DWORD handle )
05963     {
05964       handles[handle] = false;
05965     }
05971     void appendRecord ( METARECORD* record )
05972     {
05973       records.push_back( record );
05974 
05975       header->nBytes += record->size();
05976       header->nRecords++;
05977     }
05983     void appendHandle ( METARECORD* record )
05984     {
05985       records.push_back( record );
05986 
05987       header->nBytes += record->size();
05988       header->nRecords++;
05989     }
05994     void deleteMetafile ( void )
05995     {
05996       for ( std::vector<METARECORD*>::const_iterator r = records.begin();
05997             r != records.end();
05998             r++ ) {
05999         delete *r;
06000       }
06001       records.clear();
06002     }
06007     void mergePoint ( const LONG& x, const LONG& y )
06008     {
06009       POINT p;
06010       p.x = x;
06011       p.y = y;
06012       mergePoint( p );
06013     }
06018     void mergePoint( const POINT& p )
06019     {
06020       POINT device_point;
06021 
06022       // *** Note, it's possible for the global transformation matrix to
06023       // affect this too. ***
06024 
06025       device_point.x = (LONG)( (float)( p.x - window_org.x ) / window_ext.cx *
06026         viewport_ext.cx + viewport_org.x );
06027 
06028       device_point.y = (LONG)( (float)( p.y - window_org.y ) / window_ext.cy *
06029         viewport_ext.cy + viewport_org.y );
06030 
06031       // If the user didn't specify a bounding rectangle in the constructor,
06032       // compute one from this data, too.
06033       if ( device_point.x < min_device_point.x ) {
06034         min_device_point.x = device_point.x;
06035         if ( update_frame ) {
06036           header->rclBounds.left = min_device_point.x - 10;
06037           header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
06038             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
06039         }
06040       }
06041       else if ( device_point.x > max_device_point.x ) {
06042         max_device_point.x = device_point.x;
06043         if ( update_frame ) {
06044           header->rclBounds.right = max_device_point.x + 10;
06045           header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
06046             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
06047         }
06048       }
06049 
06050       if ( device_point.y < min_device_point.y ) {
06051         min_device_point.y = device_point.y;
06052         if ( update_frame ) {
06053           header->rclBounds.top = min_device_point.y - 10;
06054           header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
06055             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
06056         }
06057       }
06058       else if ( device_point.y > max_device_point.y ) {
06059         max_device_point.y = device_point.y;
06060         if ( update_frame ) {
06061           header->rclBounds.bottom = max_device_point.y + 10;
06062           header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
06063             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
06064         }
06065       }
06066     }
06067   };
06068 
06069 } // close EMF namespace
06070 
06071 #endif /* _LIBEMF_H */
Generated on Wed Jul 21 14:53:25 2010 for EMF by  1.5.9-20090622
